metadata.name: Receive a Shipment with an ASN

description: A shipment arrives from a supplier who sent an Advance Ship Notice (ASN). The receiving process should be faster as the details are already in the system.

nodes.task_description: The operator scans the barcode on the BOL or pallet.

expected_outcome.expected: The system finds the matching ASN from the supplier.

nodes.task_description: The system displays the expected contents of the shipment based on the ASN data.

expected_outcome.expected: The operator sees what they are supposed to receive.

nodes.task_description: The operator simply verifies the pallet count and confirms the receipt, without needing to count individual items.

expected_outcome.expected: The receipt is processed quickly and efficiently.

nodes.task_description: The inventory is updated in the system based on the quantities in the ASN.

expected_outcome.expected: The inventory is now available in the system.
